_meta.description: Lifecycle policy for banks that static code scanning marks as unused. Used by governance audits to classify keep/deprecate/remove intent without mutating runtime loading behavior.

pathPrefixRules.reason: Archived packs intentionally retained for migration traceability.
Doc-int packs are runtime/eval assets; static call-site scans undercount their usage.
Operator playbooks are selected by policy/runtime composition, not always by direct ID literals.
Domain semantics are loaded via indirection and should not be auto-pruned from static audit output.
Structure ontologies are shared extraction assets with indirect lookups.
Taxonomy banks back document intelligence and retrieval routing as indirect dependencies.

categoryRules.reason: Manifest/control-plane banks are foundational and should remain active.
Probe banks are CI assets and may not appear in production codepaths.
Schema banks may be loaded indirectly by validators and remain intentionally retained.
Test-only banks are retained for CI certification coverage.

idOverrides.reason: Eval registry is CI support data with indirect loading paths.
Structure fallback dictionary retained for extraction compatibility.
